onlyVariableDomains: idol identity and approved visual references
action choreography and action-facing labels while preserving row semantics
idol-specific public social-feed target without changing monitor behavior
the two mandatory organization extensions declared below
scope.everythingElse: immutable unless the project owner explicitly approves a numbered protocol exception

GUIDE-EXT-002-CURRENT-USER-AUTOSTART.menuPlacement: immediately below the public-feed manual-check item
GUIDE-EXT-002-CURRENT-USER-AUTOSTART.disableBehavior: delete only this product's current-user Run value and persist the disabled choice
GUIDE-EXT-002-CURRENT-USER-AUTOSTART.pathRefreshBehavior: when enabled, normal startup or re-enable idempotently updates the value to the current executable path
GUIDE-EXT-002-CURRENT-USER-AUTOSTART.failureBehavior: do not interrupt the character runtime; leave the menu state consistent and report a concise local error

baselineIntegrity.pathMatchMode: case-sensitive full repository-relative POSIX glob; * does not cross slash and ** crosses zero or more path segments
baselineIntegrity.changedPathMatchCardinality: every path in git diff --name-only baseline..HEAD must match exactly one allowed paths rule; zero matches or multiple matches fail
requiredDeliveryProof: baseline-proof.json with every changed file mapped to one allowed change domain

allowedPathAndEditKinds.allowed: product identity, character description, rights text, replacement evidence and user documentation

identity and product-facing literal/token replacements plus only the catalog, resource loading, menu and persistence code required by GUIDE-EXT-001 and the current-user Run-value code required by GUIDE-EXT-002; animation protocols, state values, timing and input priority remain frozen
identity/path/version replacements plus only the per-official-skin validation, unique resource linking and one-EXE packaging connections required by GUIDE-EXT-001

character action-source filename strings, declarative row-label strings, approved character palette-anchor literals and QA title strings only; control flow, calculations and protocol constants remain byte-identical
approved character icon only; private visual source strips, generated frames and QA artifacts stay in ignored work/output directories
example product identity and character-facing documentation only
generated guide-level JSON, text logs and screenshots required by this contract; never runtime source or executable code

baselineIntegrity.internalSourceDirectory: source/standalone/xiaoxiwei/ is a frozen implementation path and must not be renamed to the new idol slug

sourceIntegrity.immutablePathRule: every tracked path outside allowedPathAndEditKinds must be byte-identical to the baseline blob; deletion, rename, replacement and equivalent rewrite all fail
sourceIntegrity.inverseReplacementVerification: apply the exact inverse of every declared identity replacement and exclude only hunks fully mapped to GUIDE-EXT-001 or GUIDE-EXT-002 in protocol-extensions.json; the remaining content must equal the baseline blob and any unmatched diff hunk fails
forbiddenReplacementTargets: method bodies outside exact registered GUIDE-EXT-001 and GUIDE-EXT-002 regions
build or QA algorithms outside registered extension regions
sourceIntegrity.iconVerification: each changed ICO must be listed with approved source, output path and SHA-256 in identity-replacements.json
sourceIntegrity.generatedVisualPolicy: private source art, generated PNG frames, motion meshes and QA renders are outputs or ignored work artifacts; they do not authorize tracked runtime or algorithm changes

templateMigrationRules.reason: a new idol project must not redistribute XiaoXiWei historical binaries
templateMigrationRules.allowedChange: in package_project.ps1 replace only the literal XiaoXiWei historical filename list with the new project's actual previously published versions; an empty list is mandatory and valid for the first release
templateMigrationRules.frozenBehavior: history collection, SHA-256 calculation, previous-version archival algorithm and all other packaging behavior remain unchanged
templateMigrationRules.fromSecondRelease: archive the immediately previous release before replacing 最新版 and include only versions actually published by this idol project

templateMigrationRules.reason: every official skin must be available from one executable without a sibling official skins directory
templateMigrationRules.allowedChange: add a bounded embedded-skin resource catalog and loader, link every validated official skin archive with a unique assembly resource name, expose all official entries in the existing skin menu and package one executable
templateMigrationRules.frozenBehavior: skin API v1 data contract, 24-row and 176-frame protocol, motion format, safety validation, atomic transition, timing, state values and input priority remain unchanged

templateMigrationRules.reason: every character must expose a user-controlled per-user startup option
templateMigrationRules.allowedChange: add one context-menu item and bounded HKCU Run-value read, upsert and delete behavior using the current quoted executable path
templateMigrationRules.frozenBehavior: no administrator elevation, scheduled task, service, HKLM write, background helper or self-test/QA registry mutation

frozenSymbolsAndBehaviors: FrameResource dimensions, row counts and entry paths
MouseLookContract radii, dead zones and hysteresis
SkinTransitionContract stages, slicing and final pose
build, self-test, QA and packaging algorithms except the exact bounded connections required by GUIDE-EXT-001 and GUIDE-EXT-002
baselineIntegrity.frozenGuideContract: this schemaVersion 2 guide contract must be copied or referenced unchanged by idol projects; only this guide repository may revise the organization contract, and project-local edits made to pass a divergent implementation are prohibited

runtime.ui: Windows Forms layered transparent top-level window
runtime.embeddedFrameResources: one uniquely named assembly manifest resource for every official skin in the release manifest
runtime.output: one single-file Windows EXE with every official skin frame-and-motion archive embedded as a manifest resource

autostart.menuPlacement: immediately after the public-feed manual-check item

frameArchive.row0NeutralCompatibilityFrame: r00/c06.png must be a neutral compatibility frame and is not part of the six-frame idle cycle

rowSemantics.semantic: quiet idle breathing and blinking; c06 neutral compatibility pose
legacy right-facing movement compatibility row; runtime movement disabled
legacy left-facing movement compatibility row; runtime movement disabled
wave; double-click action
jump; c00-c02 also provide drag-startle and held-startle poses
failed or upset reaction
waiting for user response
working
reviewing or checking
direct mouse-look directions 000 through 157.5 degrees
direct mouse-look directions 180 through 337.5 degrees
tired, recover, frown, lift foot, stomp, pout; drag release uses c02-c05
built-in-skin adorable action
built-in-skin laughing action
built-in-skin crying action
current skin exclusive action slot; external activation requires non-empty exclusiveAction metadata
reserved compatibility placeholder; no runtime trigger
reserved compatibility placeholder; no runtime trigger
characterful hand-dance idle
singing or stage-performance idle without bundled copyrighted audio or lyrics
heroic acting or character-performance idle

c00-c06 must contain a recognizable flying-kiss or camera-directed affectionate greeting process and must not degrade to a pure pose, salute or fist bump; c07 is the stable front-facing live pose and skin-transition final pose
persistent seated-phone state: c00-c03 enter, c03-c05 ping-pong loop, c06-c07 click exit
persistent side-rest sleep: c00-c04 enter, c04 hold, c05-c07 click wake

leftMouseDownPriority: an active skin transition consumes the input
sleep enter-hold-wake consumes the input; holding sleep begins click wake
phone enter-hold-exit consumes the input; holding phone begins click exit
the linan-princess persistent swing consumes the input; active swing requests its fixed exit sequence
only when none of the states above owns the input may a drag candidate begin
inputAndStateMachine.dragStartle: row 4 c00-c02; hold c02 while dragging

skinApi.directory: skins/<id>/ for optional third-party compatibility only
skinApi.exclusiveActionEffect: name and enable row 15 only; it cannot inject code or change any other row, trigger, timing or state

externalReachability.row15: reachable only when exclusiveAction is non-empty

runtimeArchiveValidation.motionNameMinimumRule: starts with motion/ and ends with .mtn
runtimeArchiveValidation.note: official release QA is intentionally stricter than the unchanged v3.0.6 runtime validator

skinApi.failureBehavior: silently skip invalid external skin and fall back to built-in skin

officialMotionPackage.requiredDirectedPairSetDefinition: using archiveFrameCounts, skip rows 9 and 10; for every column of every other row add (row,column)->(row,(column+1)%rowCount); for every row other than row 0 also add (row,column)->(0,0); no other pair is permitted

optionalSocialMonitor.manualCheckBehavior: queue an immediate thread-pool check; do not wait for the 9-11 minute normal interval
optionalSocialMonitor.offlineBehavior: silent retry without interrupting the character
optionalSocialMonitor.allowedIdentityChange: replace only the idol-specific public URL, product-facing text and trusted-host allowlist
optionalSocialMonitor.unauthenticatedSourceUnavailableBehavior: disable that source and degrade silently without changing the character runtime

singleExecutable.orchestrator: build.ps1 or package_single_exe.ps1 called by build.ps1

afterBuilds: one-EXE packaging after all required QA has passed
buildPipelines.forbiddenInterpretation: do not split official skins into multiple executables and do not use the optional third-party package as a substitute for embedding an official skin

requiredEvidenceArtifacts: skin-pack-report.json for every official skin before embedding
embedded-skin-catalog-report.json proving release-manifest equality and per-skin decode
autostart-qa.json proving HKCU-only idempotent enable, disable, re-enable, path refresh and no self-test/QA registry mutation
qa-window launch and clean-exit log plus screenshot
125-percent, 225-percent and 400-percent screenshots on dark and light backgrounds
interaction evidence for drag, double-click, mouse-look exit, phone, sleep, skin transition and offline behavior
clean-windows-smoke-test.json containing environment, launch command, result and EXE SHA-256

guideLevelEvidence.producer: the implementing AI or independent release QA after the frozen build steps; absence is a failure and does not permit changes outside registered extension regions

releaseLayout.historyRule: apply MIGRATION-001-RELEASE-HISTORY: first release has an empty project history; from the second release onward, before replacing 最新版 archive only this idol project's actual previous product EXE; never copy XiaoXiWei binaries
releaseLayout.hashPolicy: SHA256SUMS.txt covers every file in releases/最新版 except the checksum file itself

forbiddenSubstitutions: Codex hatch-pet 8x11 atlas as the final Windows product
video or GIF playback instead of the state machine
a sibling official skins directory required for normal operation
fewer than 24 rows or fewer than 176 archived frames
reducing or disabling required interactions to pass QA
